race.comment: STOLI BOLLI (4) proved a tough winner first up at Flemington on wet ground, certainly putting any theory he's a 'non winner' to bed having been close up all last preparation without quite breaking through. Loses D Lane here and the draw isn't ideal but 1200m suits and he can strip fitter. DUCHESS ZOU (10) has been thereabouts in two runs back, just finding the in form Rue De Royale a bit too strong last start at Caulfield. Peaks now and draws to sit in a decent spot. NIMBUSTWOTHOUSAND (6) was just edged out by STOLI BOLLI last time but is racing very well and should get a good run just off the pace. IMMORTAL STAR (5) is another in form horse and impossible to knock, she'll only run well again. ELOUYOU (2) resumes with the peaks to win, he loves it wet when he's able to roll in front.
